title: Bolgoink clan
content:
{{Top|canon=Bolgoink Clan}}
The '''Bolgoink clan''' was a clan of [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]] from [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]]<ref name="Murder">{{JournalCite|14|Murder in Slushtime}}</ref> who ruled the settlement of [[Bolgoink]], where the [[Bolgoink Fair]] was held.

==Members==
*[[Kufbrug]]—Clan Matron (alpha [[Gender/Legends|female]])<ref name="Murder" />
*[[Vrokk]]—Clan Warlord (alpha [[Gender/Legends|male]])<ref name="Murder" />
*[[Lugh/Legends|Lugh]]—Warlord (second)<ref name="Murder" />
*[[Gundruk]]—Matron (elder daughter of Kufbrug and holder of the [[Nudskutch]] region of the Bolgoink hereditary claim)<ref name="Murder" />
*[[Rog]]—Warlord (Husband of Gundruk and Warlord of Nudskutch region)<ref name="Murder" />

{{Stub}}

==Appearances==
